productDisplayName: Lotto Men XD III Grey Shoes
description: Designed for runners who never compromise on style and comfort, the XD III running shoe from lotto comes with a durable synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces.UpperHeavily meshed upper with startegically placed patent leather overlay on the forefoot for breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar for breathable comfort and snug fitCushioned footbed for shock absorptionBranding on the sides, at the back of the collar and on the tongueMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with terraced lugs on the forefoot and midfoot and circular grooves on the big toe mount for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
